reason: Agent successfully used GitHub tool to check authenticated username and returned "yiw190" within the 4-minute timeout.
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with agent list visible in sidebar.
Step 2: Found and clicked the "QA-20260513-030816-t9t0" agent in the sidebar — Agent page opened and displayed the agent detail view.
Step 3: Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status was "idle", meeting the requirement.
Step 4: Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message was typed in the input field and sent successfully. Agent status changed to "working".
Step 5a: Waited for first request card — "Request Connected Account" card appeared asking to grant GitHub account access. GitHub account was already connected and selected.
Step 5b: Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button to grant GitHub account access — Permission was granted and agent resumed working.
Step 5c: Waited for second request card — "Allow get the authenticated user?" card appeared requesting permission for GitHub API call (GET /user).
Step 5d: Selected "Always allow read:user" scope and granted permission — Appropriate scope was selected for reading user profile data.
Step 6: Waited up to 4 minutes for response — Agent completed work in 57 seconds (well within the 4-minute limit).
Step 7: Verified response includes GitHub username and took screenshot — Response clearly displayed: "Your GitHub username is yiw190." Final screenshot captured showing complete successful execution.
